top_signals.title: Trump Insists Iran Deal Is Close After Scrapping Strikes
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump pulled back threatened military strikes against Iran, a reversal that came after he vowed to hit the Islamic Republic “VERY HARD” and threatened to seize its oil infrastructure. Bloomberg's Jill Disis has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.summary: The latest meeting of the Synchronisation thematic engagement working group

top_signals.title: China's nuclear power capacity nearly doubled since 2016
top_signals.summary: From 2016 to 2024, China's nuclear generation capacity increased 76% (24 GW), based on our International Energy Statistics (IES) data. According to the International Atomic Energy Agency's Power Reactor Information System (PRIS), China added an additional 1.1 GW of nuclear power capacity in 2025 and 2.2 GW in 2026 (through May). China is continuing to build out its nuclear generating capacity and has 36 reactors under construction, accounting for more than 49% of total world nuclear construction, according to PRIS.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Speech by Executive Vice-President Fitto at New European Bauhaus Festival 2026
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 11 Jun 2026 Ladies and gentlemen, Dear colleagues, 
It is my great pleasure to welcome you to this third day of the NEB festival.
I am delighted to see so many of you here ...

top_signals.title: Dodgers’ Shohei Ohtani leaves game early due to left knee inflammation
top_signals.summary: Ohtani ​was 2-for-2 with his ‌second home ‌run in as many ​games and had reached base four times before his departure.
